items.caption: A close-up of a mace, a medieval weapon, with a flanged head and a long handle. the mace is depicted in a side view, highlighting its design and construction. the background is a solid color, providing a clear contrast to the mace. there is text overlaying the image, which provides historical context about the mace, stating that it was a symbol of rank and status, and an effective weapon against plate and mail armor. the text also mentions that the mace was easy to use, very tough, and did not require sharpening. the morning star is mentioned as a similar weapon to the mace, and it is noted that the mace has longer and sharper spikes.
